atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports numbness and tingling in the fingers and wrist.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain in the wrist.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the symptoms began gradually and have been ongoing for approximately three months.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the symptoms are worse at night.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the symptoms often wake him up.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports shaking alleviates the sensation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports performing landscaping and heavy labor daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports repetitive motions and lifting heavy objects contribute to the symptoms.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports occasional alcohol consumption.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any previous diagnoses of rheumatoid arthritis.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals decreased grip strength on the left hand.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals a positive Tinel's sign on the left wrist.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports feeling a 'zing' sensation in the fingertips.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's symptoms and physical exam findings are consistent with carpal tunnel syndrome

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports carpal tunnel syndrome exacerbated by repetitive occupational activities

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I am prescribing ibuprofen 600 mg every six hours as needed for pain relief

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I will order an EMG to further evaluate the nerve conduction studies

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: We will also provide a wrist splint for comfort and support

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I would like to schedule a follow-up appointment in two weeks to assess progress

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I will also explore options for modifying his landscaping work to reduce repetitive motions

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I will also consider referring him to a landscape designer for project planning
